content.en:
Xuanxu Ancestral Realm.

Ye Tian came back, with a smile on his face.

Although it will not be possible to copy the bone soldier to sneak into the forbidden land of the Sea of Bones next time, this time the harvest is very large, and it is not in vain that he has been planning for a long time.

"Eighteen bone beads, 120,000 ancestral bone stones, I don't know if this ancestral bone stone has any effect on me?"

Ye Tian took out an ancestral bone stone and absorbed and refined it.

"It's a bit effective, but it's far inferior to a bone bead, according to estimates, the cumulative effect of 120,000 ancestral bone stones is estimated to be equivalent to a bone bead!" Ye Tian estimated.

In this way, it is natural that the effect of bone beads is greater!

However, it was useless for him to keep the ancestral bone stone, and there was no way to go to the forbidden land of the Sea of Bones to buy bone beads!

"Refine them all!"

Ye Tian decided.

One by one, the ancestral bone stones were consumed under Ye Tian's refining, and year after year, only tens of thousands of years, all these ancestral bone stones were refined by Ye Tian.

And Ye Tian's cultivation has also improved, and his strength has become stronger.

In the following days, Ye Tian continued to refine bone beads one by one.

As the bone beads were refined, Ye Tian's strength became stronger and stronger.

Moreover, Ye Tian found that he was far from reaching the limit, and it seemed that his combat power had reached the peak of the top ancestor, but he could still continue to improve, which showed that his foundation was far from being comparable to other top ancestors.

In the blink of an eye, hundreds of thousands of years have passed.

At this time, all the eighteen bone beads were refined by Ye Tian.

And now, Ye Tian's strength has increased several times.

His previous strength had already reached an incomparably terrifying level, and now it had increased several times, which would be incomparably terrifying.

"I can continue to enter the forbidden land of the Sea of Bones, and this time my strength has increased several times, those bone kings are afraid that they don't know, I can hide part of my strength, and when the time comes, I can break out all at once, maybe I can kill some more bone soldiers, so as to get a lot of bone beads!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Once he obtained more bone beads, his strength would reach an incomparably terrifying level, thus sweeping across the Bone Sea Forbidden Land.

In short, this time he wanted to enter the Bone Sea Forbidden Land to harvest more bone beads.

this day.

Ye Tian's copy body came to the outside of the Bone Sea Forbidden Land, and without the slightest hesitation, he directly entered the Bone Sea Forbidden Land.

Bang!!!!

Ye Tian took the initiative to enter the depths of the Bone Sea Forbidden Land, and at this time, twenty-five Bone Kings appeared, which was estimated to be all the Bone Kings of the Bone Sea Forbidden Land.

At the same time, a large number of bone generals and bone soldiers formed a team to kill Ye Tian.

"Damn ancestor, you really didn't die, but even if you didn't die, killing your special clone would bring you a huge loss!"

The Bone Kings said angrily.

In their opinion, Ye Tian's clone is so special, just like the ontology, it must pay a great price.

With their twenty-five Bone Kings plus so many bone generals and bone soldiers, it was enough to bombard Ye Tian, and it was impossible for Ye Tian to kill a bone soldier.

Thundered!!!!

Under the constant siege, Ye Tian seemed to be completely crushed, and he was even injured a lot, as if he was in a desperate situation.

At this time, the bone kings relaxed, thinking that Ye Tian was powerless to return to the sky, and he would definitely die.

That's when it happened.

Ye Tian suddenly burst out with all his combat power, rushed out of the siege of the bone kings, and killed the bone soldiers.

The Extreme Arm Ultimate Ancestor Technique combined with the Hegemony Ultimate Ancestor Technique, and then rushed over at the extreme speed with the two speed-based Ultimate Ancestral Skills of the Streamer Ultimate Ancestor Technique and the Golden-Winged Ultimate Ancestor Technique, thus breaking out the pinnacle blow.

Rumble!!!!

Under the blow, the three bone soldiers could not dodge, and were directly shattered by the blow, and fell and died on the spot, leaving three bone beads.

Ye Tian waved his hand, and after collecting the three bone beads, he continued to bombard the other bone soldiers.

Although the bone soldiers were comparable to ordinary ancestors, the gap was too big compared to Ye Tian, and they could not prove that they could withstand a full blow, after all, Ye Tian's strength was dozens of times stronger than that of ordinary top ancestors.

"Stop him!!"

The Bone Kings said urgently.

If Ye Tian is allowed to kill too many bone soldiers, once a large number of bone beads are harvested, they can use the bone beads to improve their strength, and then they will not be able to deal with Ye Tian.

Once that's the case, they're in big trouble.

"Get out of here with all the skeletal soldiers!"

The Bone Kings commanded.

No matter how strong Ye Tian's strength is, he can't kill a bone general with one blow, and it takes a few moves to kill the bone general.

Therefore, the bone generals can stay here, but the bone soldiers cannot.

However, the speed of the bone soldiers was too slow, and Ye Tian's speed was too fast, much faster than the speed of these bone kings, these bone kings could not trap Ye Tian in the first place, so they lost the opportunity to besiege Ye Tian.

Bang bang bang!!!

A famous bone soldier was blasted by Ye Tian and turned into bone beads.

In a short time, Ye Tian harvested more than thirty bone beads.

By this time, many of the skeleton soldiers had already disappeared and fled.

At this time, it is not suitable to chase and kill the bone soldiers, because the bone soldiers must have fled into the lair, where there is a bone formation, if he goes, the bone kings can easily bombard him with the formation.

So, he began to attack the bone generals.

However, there are a lot of bone generals, plus twenty-five bone kings besieging him.

It was difficult for him to kill one bone general, and in the end, he paid the price of serious injuries before killing two bone generals and escaping from the forbidden land of the sea of bones.

If Ye Tian's body also came in, the body plus the copy body might be able to kill more bone generals and a large number of bone soldiers, but Ye Tian didn't dare to take risks, after all, the strength of the bone clan was mysterious and unpredictable, and he could also mobilize more bone kings from the other end of the door, and maybe even mobilize a more powerful bone clan.

At that point, he will be in danger.

Therefore, he only dared to send a copy of the body, and it didn't matter if he gained less, at least his own safety.

After coming out of the forbidden land of the Sea of Bones, Ye Tian's copy body sent the harvest to the main body, and immediately disbanded the copy body by itself.

"Two bone generals, thirty-three bone soldiers, this harvest is too big!"

Ye Tian said very excitedly.

Once he has refined all these bone beads, the twenty-five bone kings will definitely not be able to stop him, if the bone clan does not have help, he will be able to sweep the entire forbidden land of the sea of bones.

At this time, in the depths of the Forbidden Land of the Sea of Bones, in a majestic hall, twenty-five Bone Kings were discussing matters about Ye Tian.
